channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-7583] sanity-sec test_16: test failed to respond and timed out
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Saurabh Tandan <saurabh.tandan@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/958566de-a275-11e5-bdef-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_16 failed with the following error:

test failed to respond and timed out

Client dmesg:

kjournald     D 0000000000000000     0   423      2 0x00000000
 ffff88003712fc50 0000000000000046 ffff8800ffffffff 00000f0ee5cecf80
 0000000000000001 ffff8800376d96e0 00000000000ad5d4 ffffffffa992b85f
 000000000079d755 ffffffff81aa6700 ffff88003700dad8 ffff88003712ffd8
Call Trace:
 [<ffffffff811c8d20>] ? sync_buffer+0x0/0x50
 [<ffffffff81538d43>] io_schedule+0x73/0xc0
 [<ffffffff811c8d60>] sync_buffer+0x40/0x50
 [<ffffffff8153980f>] __wait_on_bit+0x5f/0x90
 [<ffffffff811c8d20>] ? sync_buffer+0x0/0x50
 [<ffffffff815398b8>] out_of_line_wait_on_bit+0x78/0x90
 [<ffffffff810a14e0>] ? wake_bit_function+0x0/0x50
 [<ffffffff811c8d16>] __wait_on_buffer+0x26/0x30
 [<ffffffffa006ebf4>] journal_commit_transaction+0x5f4/0x12f0 [jbd]
 [<ffffffff81289970>] ? cfq_kick_queue+0x0/0x60
 [<ffffffff81089acc>] ? lock_timer_base+0x3c/0x70
 [<ffffffff8108a6cb>] ? try_to_del_timer_sync+0x7b/0xe0
 [<ffffffffa0073ea5>] kjournald+0xe5/0x240 [jbd]
 [<ffffffff810a1460>] ? autoremove_wake_function+0x0/0x40
 [<ffffffffa0073dc0>] ? kjournald+0x0/0x240 [jbd]
 [<ffffffff810a0fce>] kthread+0x9e/0xc0
 [<ffffffff8100c28a>] child_rip+0xa/0x20
 [<ffffffff810a0f30>] ? kthread+0x0/0xc0
 [<ffffffff8100c280>] ? child_rip+0x0/0x20
auditd        D 0000000000000000     0  1296      1 0x00000000
 ffff880037b3be08 0000000000000082 ffff880037b3bd78 0000000000000082
 ffffea000146edf8 ffff88003712fe80 0000000000000000 ffff880037c3bcb0
 0000000000000000 0000000000000000 ffff880037cf3ad8 ffff880037b3bfd8
Call Trace:
 [<ffffffff810a178e>] ? prepare_to_wait+0x4e/0x80
 [<ffffffffa0073c95>] log_wait_commit+0x105/0x170 [jbd]
 [<ffffffff810a1460>] ? autoremove_wake_function+0x0/0x40
 [<ffffffffa008c7d6>] ext3_sync_file+0x126/0x1a0 [ext3]
 [<ffffffff81127da8>] ? filemap_write_and_wait_range+0x78/0x90
 [<ffffffff811c4611>] vfs_fsync_range+0xa1/0x100
 [<ffffffff811c46dd>] vfs_fsync+0x1d/0x20
 [<ffffffff811c471e>] do_fsync+0x3e/0x60
 [<ffffffff811c4770>] sys_fsync+0x10/0x20
 [<ffffffff8100b0d2>] system_call_fastpath+0x16/0x1b

May be related to LU-4950
item.summary: sanity-sec test_16: test failed to respond and timed out

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Another instance found for Full tag 2.7.66 -EL7.1 Server/EL7.1 Client - ZFS, build# 3314
https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/e1fde158-cb88-11e5-b49e-5254006e85c2

Another instance on master for FULL - EL7.1 Server/EL7.1 Client - ZFS, build# 3314
https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/e1fde158-cb88-11e5-b49e-5254006e85c2
